description_long: This is a modern, large-caliber sniper rifle featuring a long, heavy barrel and a robust, angular receiver. It is equipped with a prominent telescopic scope mounted on top for precision aiming at long distances. The rifle has a fixed, skeletonized stock with an adjustable cheek rest and a thick buttpad for recoil absorption. A bipod is attached near the front of the barrel, providing stability when firing from a prone or supported position. The magazine is a detachable box type, positioned just in front of the trigger guard. The overall finish is matte black and dark gray, with metallic and polymer components visible throughout.
description: A large, modern sniper rifle with a long barrel, telescopic scope, bipod, and skeletonized stock, finished in matte black and gray.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the scope, bipod, stock, and magazine.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel's muzzle, bipod legs, and the narrow profile of the scope and receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the stock, scope, bipod, and magazine from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the buttstock, cheek rest, and the alignment of the scope and barrel.
